title: VanillaPierce
body:
This is a Unoffical ClownPierce pack that uses vanilla colors!

I did not make all of this pack:
- [Beyond](https://modrinth.com/user/Beyond): Bow, Trident, Arrow, Diamond Sword, Netherite Sword, Diamond Axe, Netherite Axe
- [Jomk](https://x.com/Jommmmk): Original Grace Texture
- [ClownMiser](https://x.com/clownmiser): Particles, Original Sword Texture
- [Moistlers](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCAqkx3Tk0sq1kk4QS6QTBVg): 3D Totem

Contact me on Discord [@beyondtheend](https://discord.com/users/766257043648544779)
